## Repository files navigation

*   [README](https://github.com/philipplackner/chirp-api#)

# Chirp API

[](https://github.com/philipplackner/chirp-api#chirp-api)

A real-time messaging API backend built with Kotlin and Spring Boot, part of the [**Building Industry-Level Kotlin Backends With Spring Boot**](https://pl-coding.com/kotlin-spring-boot?utm_source=github&utm_medium=readme&utm_campaign=default&cmc_strip=utm) course.

### System Architecture

[](https://github.com/philipplackner/chirp-api#system-architecture)

[![Image 7: chirp-system-design](https://private-user-images.githubusercontent.com/14947392/488464492-27fec017-281c-424c-a2a5-f3060f783c8d.png?jwt=eyJ0eXAiOiJKV1QiLCJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..LcPKPOKjL07gHb7-VTmKrV0utcmqPBGFWbZ4J1b6RAM)](https://private-user-images.githubusercontent.com/14947392/488464492-27fec017-281c-424c-a2a5-f3060f783c8d.png?jwt=eyJ0eXAiOiJKV1QiLCJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..LcPKPOKjL07gHb7-VTmKrV0utcmqPBGFWbZ4J1b6RAM)[![Image 8: chirp-architecture](https://private-user-images.githubusercontent.com/53933333/490445682-112bdc07-12c8-4dba-a602-09f2c76d7b42.png?jwt=eyJ0eXAiOiJKV1QiLCJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..ClqMXK9PV6vWB9XSKhVNlwWmPq1PSI7D2jT3aJD9z2s)](https://private-user-images.githubusercontent.com/53933333/490445682-112bdc07-12c8-4dba-a602-09f2c76d7b42.png?jwt=eyJ0eXAiOiJKV1QiLCJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..ClqMXK9PV6vWB9XSKhVNlwWmPq1PSI7D2jT3aJD9z2s)

## What's covered?

[](https://github.com/philipplackner/chirp-api#whats-covered)

*   Multi-module Spring Boot architecture
*   JWT & API Key authentication
*   Real-time messaging with WebSocket
*   Push notifications with Firebase
*   Email service integration
*   Rate limiting & IP tracking
*   RabbitMQ message queuing
*   Redis caching
*   Supabase storage integration
*   Password reset & email verification flows

## Technology Stack

[](https://github.com/philipplackner/chirp-api#technology-stack)
